wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#ffe4e6!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#831843!important;box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(131,24,67,.4)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{padding:13px 26px!important;color:#831843!important;letter-spacing:.04em;transition:all .3s;position:relative;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#831843,#e11d48);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .3s;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover::after,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a::after{transform:scaleX(1);} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover{color:#9d174d!important;background:rgba(131,24,67,.06)!important;} .art-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#831843,#9d174d);padding:28px 26px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,228,230,.2);} .art-header .art-tag{display:inline-block;background:rgba(255,228,230,.15);border:1px solid rgba(255,228,230,.25);border-radius:20px;padding:3px 12px;font-size:10px;color:#ffe4e6;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px;} .art-header h4{color:#fff1f2;font-size:18px;font-weight:600;margin:0 0 4px;} .art-header p{color:#fecdd3;font-size:12px;margin:0;} .art-footer{padding:16px 26px;background:#fff1f2;border-top:1px solid rgba(131,24,67,.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:16px;} .art-footer a{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(131,24,67,.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#831843!important;font-size:15px;transition:all .2s;} .art-footer a:hover{background:#831843;color:#ffffff!important;}
content_before_menu_element:
